name_en: Goyard Cisalpin Briefcase embodies the timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship of the Cisalpin backpack, presented in a new form. It reinterprets the design philosophy of the Goyard house, making it a loyal companion to safely store your business and personal items while remaining stylish. Designed for modern life.
name_cn:
Goyard Cisalpin Briefcase embodies the timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship of the Cisalpin backpack, presented in a new form. It reinterprets the design philosophy of the Goyard house, making it a loyal companion to safely store your business and personal items while remaining stylish. Designed for modern life.
Size: 39*29*9cm
🔍020235
